view.title: Validate explicit UC need #8

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 8 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for priority booking.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for priority booking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of 'Priority booking (members book before public)', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this behavior. While the linked use case mentions that members get a 7-day advance booking compared to 3 days for non-members, there is no direct evidence or API response that verifies this priority booking functionality in the current state. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
